content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.1.1(ii) — Both usage strings are specific and feature-tied: camera string matches the receipt scanner (ReceiptScannerView.swift:8-16, requestAccess for .video), and NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription describes the Export-to-photo-library action (Info.plist:9-10); no empty, placeholder, or generic copy.
